original: This native zaika peers thoughtfully at you from underneath her luminescent, neon green hair, fixing you firmly in the path of her luminous, augmented eyes. For all her fierceness, she didn’t seem to bother with armor. Her clothing amounts to little more than a clear plastic suit with densely-packed elastic netting hanging supportively around her petite bust. Clear seams on her skin indicate cybernetics or other augmentations; you’d better not let her seeming nudity distract you from the fact she’s after your body.

The zaika keeps you fixed in her hungry stare as she battles you, unbothered by the few strands of glowing blue hair that drift past her view. She sports a clear plastic bodysuit for clothing, covering her from neck to feet except for a mesh-filled gap across her well-formed breasts. Like all zaika, she lacks nipples. Cybernetic seams in her vibrant purple skin hint at subdermal armor plating and the possibility of augmented musculature. The heels of her feet are especially thick with them, indicative of heavy modding to enable her rooftop leaps.

The chesty zaika licks her lips as she circles you, brushing back her glowing coral hair with the unconcerned air of a runway model. You might have been able to ignore her bounteous bosom if she wasn’t dressed quite so revealingly. Clear plastic makes up the bulk of her see-through bodysuit save for the web of straining elastic strands supporting her tits. She might as well be naked! When she moves, her breasts wobble enticingly, like the netting is more of a suggestion than true support. You’d think she was some kind of cosplaying trollop if it wasn’t for the high-grade cybernetics that enabled her to make such an impressive jump.
You see through the ruse and keep your distance!

You fall for the ruse, allowing her to circle around and grab you from behind. Her hands fall on your [pc.chest], squeezing and kneading like a pro! Milk drizzles "+(e.isChestExposed()?"out onto her fingers":"all over the inside of your [pc.chestCoverUnder]")+" before you can wriggle free, but there’s no calming the effect she had on your teats!
Your airtight equipment isn’t quite so airtight any longer!
Still trying to fight me? Not for much longer.
Listen, I just want your milk. Maybe you’ll see things my way after this - don’t hold your breath, now.
C’moooonnnn, just let me milk you! Here, take a deep breath and let’s forget about this!
Ooh, you’re a feisty alien! You’re not alone in that - and you won’t be alone submitting to me!
Can you even see how horny I am already? This could be you, if you’d let me milk you! C’monc’mon let’s just skip to that part!
Fffuuck come ooonnn, Rushers like being milked! And we like milking you! Fine, fine, I guess you need some encouragement!

” Agile fingers work the knob on the back while you consider the merits of responding to her call out. Before you can blink, the zaika hops forward and levies her chunky weapon at chest-height, tightening the trigger. A cloud of plum-pink mist channels down the barrel and hisses in your direction; the diffusive discharge swirls in your vicinity - there’s no dodging it!
The questionable chemical concoction flows around you, failing to penetrate your airtight equipment. No doubt, if you had been unprepared, you would be a helplessly lustful mess by now...
No matter how the chemical’s tendrils may speed your heartbeat, at the end of the day your mind is in charge of your body - not the other way around

, and it’ll take more than some cheap drug to change that. You grit your teeth, a bit more excited, yes, but nowhere near as much as your foe would expect. When the fog clears, she’s stamping her foot in frustration. <i>“
Jerk! That stuff’s expensive! The least you could do is cum"+(e.isCrotchExposed()?" for me":" in your pants")+"!
Playing hard to get? That’s hot too! It’ll feel even better when you’re begging me for a milking soon!
Oh-hohoho, you’re just a bag of tricks aren’t you? Don’t worry, I’ve got plenty of that stuff in the tank! You won’t hold out for long, and you’ll be giving me all that delicious milk soon!
... yet there’s something intriguing about the surging warmth, ebbing away at your self-control. Your iron will is of so little avail when you’re this turned on!

Before you can think to cover your mouth, the erotic concoction slithers into your nostrils and clings to the roof of your mouth. Radiant arousal blooms inside and your mind wanders. The miasma begins to disperse, but not before your drooly gasps have left you chemically impassioned.

Fresh lubricants spill"+(e.isCrotchExposedByLowerUndergarment()?" onto the jagged pavement, earning a few words of mocking contempt from boisterous onlookers. Even they want to see you submit":" into your undies, a sticky marinade that signals to her your softening attitude and increasing desire to comply")+". <i>“
Come on, know your place, off-worlder! I need that milk!
Ooooh, I like that look! C’mon cutie-pie, let’s see you on "+(e.hasKnees()?"your knees":"the ground")+" now! Or do you need more?
Mmmfhmhm... looks like you wanna be milked now. Right? Right? C’mon, just sit down, let me have all your milk, and I’ll give you something nice and sticky in return!
You dodge!
You dodge the crackling blast!
You dodge!
You sidestep the short-ranged attack.
No longer tripped!

Good thing you can’t be blinded!
